creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Triage: 

* aim to make a cross-reference from bug 266907

  * reuse the 'see also' field for a full URL with the same bug report number

* begin the summary line with emulators/virtualbox-ose

  * adapted slightly, as koobs@ did for 266907 on 2022-10-12

* set the assignee that would have been automated by beginning with 
  emulators/virtualbox-ose

* keyword

… and thank you :-)
